subcodes.first_line: O star shining with the Light of Faith! The letter which thou hadst written on 19th June 1919 was received. And the bunch of flowers
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ستاره درخشنده بنور ایمان نامه ای که بتاریخ ۱۹ حزیران ۱۹۱۹ مرقوم نموده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @universal peace; world unity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @equality of men and women
